svg.title: Compiling Process — CUD zu Runtime Projection
svg.desc: Pipeline von CUD-Quelldateien über Compiler-Engine, Projection-Bridge, Validator und Cache hin zum runtime_json_kernel und zum Single-Writer SEM.

g.text: vendor module on isolated sys.path, stale modules invalidated before import
build_runtime_projection_bundle composes a stable runtime contract
overlays projection onto legacy base, sortiert deterministisch
applies process_states und control_methods live patches falls aktiviert
